creator: rigoletto@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 184780
[NEW PORT] Ohsnap font.

Hello,

I would like to maintain a port of the Ohsnap font. I attach a patch.

https://sourceforge.net/projects/osnapfont/

"Monospaced font based on Artwiz Snap with bold and a version
with status icons.

There are ISO8859-1 version, a version with status icons,
consolefonts and a work on ISO10646-1.
Available sizes are: 6x11, 7x12, 6x13 and 7x14."

Thank you!
